meta.title: Features — GateCtr
meta.description: Budget Firewall, Context Optimizer, Model Router, Analytics, Webhooks, and RBAC. One gateway. Full control.

hero.headline: Full control over every LLM request.
hero.description: Budget caps, token optimization, intelligent routing, real-time analytics — all active from day one. No code changes.

grid.label: What's included
grid.headline: Everything you need. Nothing you don't.

items.title: Budget Firewall
items.tagline: Hard caps. Soft alerts. No surprise invoices.
items.description: Every request passes through the firewall before reaching the LLM. Hit the cap — request blocked, zero tokens consumed.

items.title: Context Optimizer
items.tagline: Compresses your prompts. -40% tokens. Same output.
items.description: Automatic prompt compression before every request. No prompt engineering. No code changes. Just savings.

items.title: Model Router
items.tagline: Picks the right LLM for each request automatically.
items.description: Simple tasks go to cheaper models. Complex ones go to the best. You pay the right price every time.

items.title: Usage Dashboard
items.description: Token usage, costs, and trends per project, per user, per model. Export to CSV. Query via API.

items.title: Webhooks Engine
items.tagline: Push events to Slack, Teams, or any URL.
items.description: Budget alerts, usage reports, anomaly detection — wherever your team already lives. HMAC-signed payloads.

items.title: RBAC & Audit Logs
items.tagline: Admin, Manager, Dev, Viewer. 90 days history.
items.description: Role-based access for teams. Full audit trail. Compliance-ready. Every request logged for 90 days.

budget.headline: Hard caps. Zero surprise invoices.
budget.description: Set token or cost limits per project. GateCtr blocks requests the moment the cap is hit — no tokens consumed, no cost incurred. Soft alerts fire before you reach the limit.
points: Blocks requests at the cap — HTTP 429, zero tokens consumed
Available on Free plan and above

optimizer.headline: -40% tokens. Same output quality.
optimizer.description: Before forwarding your request, GateCtr compresses the prompt — removes filler, condenses instructions, trims history. Average reduction: -40%. Output quality maintained.
points: Enabled by default on Pro plans
Works with all providers — OpenAI, Anthropic, Mistral, Gemini

router.headline: The right model. Every time.
router.description: Pass model: 'auto' and GateCtr scores the request — complexity, quality requirements, provider pricing — then routes to the optimal model. You pay less without thinking about it.
points: Configure provider preferences in the dashboard

analytics.headline: Every token. Every cost. Measured.
analytics.description: Every request is logged automatically — tokens in/out, cost, model, latency, project. View in the dashboard or query via API. Export to CSV for your BI tools.
points: Real-time dashboard — overview, by project, by model
Query via REST API with date range filters
CSV export for Metabase, Tableau, Power BI

webhooks.headline: Alerts where your team already lives.
webhooks.description: Configure endpoints for budget alerts, usage reports, and anomaly detection. HMAC-SHA256 signed payloads. Automatic retries. Works with Slack, Teams, Zapier, or any HTTP endpoint.
points: Native Slack formatting for budget events

cta.headline: All six features. Free to start.
cta.description: No credit card. Setup in 5 min. Budget Firewall and Analytics active on the free plan.
cta.trust: No credit card required · Cancel anytime
